title: A self-driving tour route in Northern Xinjiang
content:
DAY 1: Beijing - Urumqi

DAY 2: Urumqi - Jiangbulak, overnight in Qitai County

DAY 3: Qitai County - Tian Shang Wucai City, overnight in Urumqi

DAY 4-5: Urumqi - Keketuhai, overnight in Keketuhai

DAY 6: Keketuhai - Wucaitan, overnight in Habahe

DAY 7: Habahe - Baihaba, overnight in Baihaba

DAY 8-9: Baihaba - Kanas Lake, overnight in Kanas Lake

DAY 10: Kanas Lake - Hemu Village, overnight in Hemu Village

DAY 11: Hemu Village - Karamay, overnight in Urho

DAY 12: Urho - Urumqi - Beijing, return home.
